title: GEEPAS Steam Iron | Clothes Dry & Steam Press | 40s Fast Heat-Up, Vertical Steaming | Nonstick Soleplate & Adjustable Temperature for Ironed Clothes | 210ml Water Tank | 2 Year Warranty 1300W White
features: ✅ POWERFUL 1300W PERFORMANCE, FAST HEAT-UP – The Geepas Steam irons deliver quick 40 seconds heat-up and efficient ironing. It ensures faster crease removal, making ironing effortless and saving time on busy mornings.

✅ NONSTICK SOLEPLATE – The flat iron is equipped with a nonstick soleplate, iron steamer glides seamlessly over all fabric types without snagging or burning. The thick soleplate ensures even heat distribution for a professional finish.

✅ ADJUSTABLE TEMPERATURE, VARIABLE STEAM CONTROL – Lightweight steam irons feature a customizable thermostat dial to suit fabrics like cotton, silk, linen, wool, and synthetics. Choose from continuous steam (20g/min) for stubborn creases.

✅ LARGE 210ML WATER TANK, POWERFUL STEAM OUTPUT – Equipped with a 210ml water tank, this steam iron ensures long ironing sessions. Delivers a continuous steam flow of 16g/min effectively removing stubborn creases for crisp, professional results.

✅ VERTICAL STEAMING & MULTI-PURPOSE IRONING – Ideal for both horizontal and vertical ironing, pressing iron allows to steam hanging garments, curtains effortlessly. The 1.91m long power cord provides maximum flexibility.
description: Product Description GEEPAS 1300W STEAM IRON Upgrade your iron for faster, pressed perfection every day. This 1300 W powered iron provides a consistently strong steam output for best crease removal, whilst the powerful stream boost loosens the fabric to target deep-set creases faster than ever. This iron comes with an easy fill 210 ml water tank, soft grip and Geepas best gliding most scratch resistant soleplate with steam tip and button groove. For easier ironing the smart steam temperature control for different types of tissues, respectively, different temperatures and types of ironing are needed. This iron steam has a temperature controller under the handle.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Lightweight, Non-Stick Soleplate, Temperature Control, Variable Steam Function
